mappings.reason: Defining and maintaining role-based access control validates that privileges are authorized, directly satisfying IAM-26's requirement to restrict source code access to authorized personnel.
Establishing an access granting process ensures that only authorized personnel are provisioned with access, enabling the restriction objective of IAM-26 under Rule 7.
Establishing an access revoking process ensures access is removed when personnel are no longer authorized, maintaining the restriction objective of IAM-26 under Rule 7.
A secure configuration process includes configuring access controls on enterprise assets, providing the technical enforcement mechanism for IAM-26 under Rule 8.
Centralizing access control through a directory or SSO provider provides the mechanism class to enforce access restrictions consistently across enterprise assets.
Ensuring service provider contracts include security requirements covers the scenario where source code is hosted externally, requiring contractual access control obligations.
